title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance II

notes:
## Description Most of the time the game starts fine after a shader recompile or when I toggle Steam’s pre-cached shaders (which probably triggers a recompilation anyway). It looks like the game occasionally selects D3D Feature Level 11 instead of the required Feature Level 12.

## Workaround Workaround was the flag: VKD3D_CONFIG=nodxr

## References - https://forums.opensuse.org/t/proton-issue-with-kingdom-come-deliverance-2-d3d-feature-level-error-on-tumbleweed/188003 - https://www.protondb.com/app/1771300#oLcEK8Mjvg
title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance II
